title: Adapter Request
description: A request sent from the Rust harness to a non-authoritative adapter.

protocol_version.description: Version of the adapter protocol this request conforms to.

run_id.description: Run identifier associated with this adapter request.

candidate_request_id.description: Unique identifier for this candidate generation request.

provider.description: Provider identifier the adapter should use.

model.description: Model identifier the adapter should use.

objective_ref.description: Reference to the objective document for this request.

constraints_ref.description: Reference to the constraints document for this request.

domain_ref.description: Reference to the domain document for this request.

input_ref.description: Reference to the input artifact for this request.

limits.description: Resource and output limits for this request.
